1.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
1.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

1.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
1.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

1.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
1.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
1.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

1.gl: Achashverosh (i.e. Ahasuerus or Artaxerxes, but in this case Xerxes), the title (rather than name) of a Persian king
properly, a burden (as causing to faint), i.e. a tax in the form of forced labor
properly, a habitable spot (as desirable); dry land, a coast, an island

2.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause

2.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

2.gl: to be (causatively make) large (in various senses, as in body, mind, estate or honor, also in pride)
2.kj: advance, boast, bring up, exceed, excellent, be(-come, do, give, make, wax), great(-er, come to... estate, [phrase] things), grow(up), increase, lift up, magnify(-ifical), be much
2.dv: a primitive root; properly, to twist (compare H1434 (גְּדִל)), i.e.

2.gl: an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property
2.kj: act, art, [phrase] bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, [idiom] well, (handy-, needle-, net-) wo

2.gl: properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book
2.kj: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.

2.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
2.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
2.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

3.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
3.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

3.gl: properly, to tread or frequent; usually to follow (for pursuit or search); by implication, to seek or ask; specifically to worship

3.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
